mapper.select: SELECT ID , NAME , CATEGORY , RATING , MEMO , EAT_DATE , CREATED_AT FROM FOOD ORDER BY ID DESC
SELECT ID , NAME , CATEGORY , RATING , MEMO , EAT_DATE , CREATED_AT FROM FOOD WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FOOD ( ID, NAME, CATEGORY, RATING, MEMO, EAT_DATE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( FOOD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{name}, #{category}, #{rating}, #{memo}, #{eatDate}, SYSDATE )
